title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Questions on digital literacy and human connection.

questions.question: Is it easier or harder to make 'real' friends in the digital age?
Do you think governments should regulate what can be posted on social media?

script.text: Is it easier or harder to make 'real' friends in the digital age?
Do you think governments should regulate what can be posted on social media?
Some say social media makes us feel more lonely. What is your view?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
